insights:
The single best deal in the current market is DeepSeek V4 Flash. It posts a value score of 666.7, by far the highest, driven by a blended price of just $0.06 per million tokens. Its intelligence score of 40 out of 60 is respectable for a budget model, and it supports a full 1000K context window at 103 tokens per second. For developers seeking maximum reasoning per dollar, this model is the clear leader.

Two notable runners-up deserve attention. MiMo-V2.5 also costs $0.06 per million tokens and achieves a value score of 616.7, but its intelligence is three points lower at 37 and its speed is a slower 64 t/s. It is a strong alternative if DeepSeek’s availability is limited. At a higher price tier, DeepSeek V4 Pro costs $0.18 per million tokens and delivers an intelligence score of 44, making it the smartest model at its price point, though its speed drops to 62 t/s. The trade-off is clear: pay three times more for 10% better intelligence, but the value score falls to 244.4.

For the most common use case—cost-sensitive API inference—the actionable recommendation is to use DeepSeek V4 Flash as your primary model. It offers the best balance of quality, speed, and context length at the lowest price. If your application demands the highest possible accuracy and you can absorb a tripling of input costs, then move up to DeepSeek V4 Pro. For all other needs, V4 Flash is the optimal choice.
